description: Add mutation to update battle allow_time_extension setting
context:
Beads description:
Ensure there's a mutation to update the allow_time_extension field on battles.

## File: src/lib/mutators.ts

## Check existing mutations
May already have a generic updateBattle mutation that can handle this field.
If not, add one or extend existing.

## Requirements
- Only battle creator (referee) can update this setting
- Validate user has permission via ctx.userId
- Should work from lobby settings UI

## Acceptance Criteria
- Mutation available to update allow_time_extension
- Proper auth check for battle ownership
- Works with Zero optimistic updates
